## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New plugin (no core change)
- [ ] Plugin change
- [ ] Kernel module change
- [ ] Contract (L1) change
- [ ] Documentation

## Invariants

<!-- Does this touch any invariant (R1–R6, see ARCHITECTURE.md §9)? If so, which, and how is it preserved? -->

- [ ] This change preserves all invariants, **or** I have explained any contract change below.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] No stray `.js` / `.d.ts` were left next to `.ts` sources
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior or configuration changed
